productDisplayName: Manchester United Men Solid Grey Track Pants
description: Composition Grey Official Merchandise manchester united trackpants made of 65% cotton and 35% polyester, has elasticated waistband with drawcord tie at front, single black stripe on each outer leg seam, no pockets, brand badge appliquéd on left thigh and Man Utd text printed on right thigh Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash warm Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry low Cool iron, do not iron on print Dress for greatness with these Official Merchandise Manchester United football Club trackpants. These soft and comfortable tracksuit pants pay homage to the incredibly successful team with bold text and club badge on the front. Team this with a tee and Man U sweatshirt for a trip to a football match or for casual outings when only the genuine Man Utd article will do. Model statistics The product is a size M, length 41.5”, on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
